problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: If Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
